allProjects.title: Voedselvoorraad (Food pantry)
allProjects.description:
Voedselvoorraad (Food pantry) is a web application that helps you organise & maintain your pantry and save recipes.
The user gets notifications for products that are nearing the expiration date and show recipes with products near expiration date.

Look for recipes with ingredients you have in your pantry already. If you make the recipe, with one click you can subtract the needed ingredients from your inventory. 
This application was developed as a group project for a school assignment and received a grade of 15/20.
allProjects.database: MySQL database and Azure blob storage
allProjects.extra: Built by William, Louis, Abdil, Lucca & Iris

allProjects.title: InterieurSim
allProjects.description:
InterieurSim is a webapplication with a full backend in development which allows the user to decorate a visual room with the available furniture and decoration in the catalog. 
This project originated from a college project in studying api microservices and deployment on Azure.
allProjects.database: Azure Cosmos db and Azure blob storage

allProjects.title: Routado
allProjects.description:
Routado is a React native application that allows dogshelters to manage the dogs information and displays an overview of the dog walking routes of the dogs/dogwalkers. 
This application was developed as an individual project for a school assignment and received a grade of 16/20.

allProjects.title: Graduate thesis XPlanner time tracker
allProjects.description:
The implementation of a new dynamic frontend interface for Xplanner with the functional programming language Clojure and the framework re-frame for the software developers and the manager of Lorre Engineering. The new application shows you a better overview of the Scumplanning- and registration. 
This application was developed as an individual project and received a grade of 16/20.
